name: 2pcs Slow Rising Butter Squishy, 2026 New Realistic Soft Butter Stick ,Butter Squishy Relief Fidget Toys,Slow Rebound Stress Relief Toy Gifts
bullets: 【Ultra Slow Rising for Deep Stress Relief】Experience the satisfying feel of this butter squishy stress relief toy made from premium soft PU foam. It slowly returns to shape after each squeeze, creating a calming sensory effect that helps ease stress and improve focus.

【Realistic Butter Stick Squishy Design】Designed to look like a real butter stick with lifelike color and texture, this realistic squishy toy doubles as a fun desk decor for office, school, or home. It adds personality and sparks conversation.

【Soft, Safe & Durable PU Foam】Made from high-quality, non-toxic PU foam, this soft squeeze fidget toy is safe for both kids and adults. Durable and long-lasting, it keeps its shape even after repeated squeezing.

【Portable & Silent Mini Fidget Toy】Lightweight and compact, this mini squishy fidget toy fits easily in your bag, pocket, or desk drawer. Perfect for stress relief at work, school, travel, or home without disturbing others.

【Perfect Sensory Gift for All Ages】This cute butter squishy fidget toy is a great gift for kids, teens, and adults. Ideal for birthdays, holidays, or everyday stress relief—fun, relaxing, and satisfying to use.

reviews.name: Mayra Guerrero
reviews.title: Good squishy for kids
reviews.body: Really soft, good quality good for kids.

reviews.name: Jason
reviews.title: Great for kids and adults
reviews.body: Kids love it! Not super durable

reviews.name: Nova Helton
reviews.title: Not slow rising
reviews.body: Great squishy just not slow rising

reviews.name: Tara Trinka
reviews.title: Love them
reviews.body: My son loves these!  They last 10x longer than the squishys that end up popping!
